exercises.name: Incline DB Bench Press
exercises.detail: 62.5 lb × 10 reps · 3 sets (use 65 lb if no 62.5s)
exercises.note: Got 9 on set 3 last time at this weight — push for 10 today. Controlled eccentric. Monitor left shoulder.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.note: Holding here until left shoulder fully heals. Shoulder has been feeling better — keep the progress going.

exercises.name: T-Bar Row
exercises.note: Back to T-bar this session. Chest to pad, drive elbows back, full stretch at bottom.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.note: Lead with elbow, stop at shoulder height. Left shoulder has been holding up well at 15s — keep it clean.

exercises.name: Arms Superset: Hammer Curl + Skull Crusher
exercises.detail: Hammer curl 25 lb × 12 + Skull crusher 40 lb × 10 · 3 rounds
exercises.note: You had DOMS from skull crushers last time — that'll be gone now. Elbows pinned on curls. Control the descent on skull crushers.

exercises.name: Core Circuit D
exercises.detail: Plank shoulder tap × 10/side + Dead bugs × 8/side + Pallof press 40 lb × 10/side · 2 rounds
exercises.note: Anti-rotation focus throughout. Hips square on shoulder taps, lower back flat on dead bugs.

week.note: Incline bench 62.5 · T-bar row · Hammer curl + Skull crusher
Leg press 360 · Hip thrust 160 · RDL 50 · Lunge 30lb
Flat bench 65 · Cable row 150 · Incline curl 22.5lb
